description: Order of payment in Arabic script. The "judge" (al-dayyān) is asked to pay 4 dinars to the bearer. On verso, in Judaeo-Arabic, the name "Abū l-Ṭāhir al-Miṣrī." Dating: Probably 12th or 13th century. (Information in part from CUDL.) Same handwriting and layout (including the Judaeo-Arabic name on verso) as T-S AS 179.204.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
